---
title: "Catharina Crawley"
---

## Catharina Crawley

**Dates:** (d.1857)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

aunt of CMY

### Biography

Sister of WCY, she married (1811) her first cousin the Rev. Charles Crawley (1780-1856).

### Letters

- Letter from March 14. 1849

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
